text_original: He whose boldness appears in his daring (to do wrong, in defiance of the laws) is put to death; he whose boldness appears in his not daring (to do so) lives on.
text_normalized: He whose boldness appears in his daring (to do wrong, in defiance of the laws) is put to death; he whose boldness appears in his not daring (to do so) lives on.

text_original: Of these two cases the one appears to be advantageous, and the other to be injurious.
text_normalized: Of these two cases the one appears to be advantageous, and the other to be injurious.

text_original: When Heaven's anger smites a man,
text_normalized: When Heaven's anger smites a man,

text_original: Who the cause shall truly scan?
text_normalized: Who the cause shall truly scan?

text_original: On this account the sage feels a difficulty (as to what to do in the former case).
text_normalized: On this account the sage feels a difficulty (as to what to do in the former case).

text_original: It is the way of Heaven not to strive, and yet it skilfully overcomes; not to speak, and yet it is skilful in (obtaining a reply); does not call, and yet men come to it of themselves.
text_normalized: It is the way of Heaven not to strive, and yet it skilfully overcomes; not to speak, and yet it is skilful in (obtaining a reply); does not call, and yet men come to it of themselves.

text_original: Its demonstrations are quiet, and yet its plans are skilful and effective.
text_normalized: Its demonstrations are quiet, and yet its plans are skilful and effective.

text_original: The meshes of the net of Heaven are large; far apart, but letting nothing escape.
text_normalized: The meshes of the net of Heaven are large; far apart, but letting nothing escape.
